<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Response; use Predis\PredisException; /** * Exception class that identifies server-side Redis errors. */ class ServerException extends PredisException implements ErrorInterface { /** * Gets the type of the error returned by Redis. * * @return string */ public function getErrorType() { [$errorType] = explode(' ', $this->getMessage(), 2); return $errorType; } /** * Converts the exception to an instance of Predis\Response\Error. * * @return Error */ public function toErrorResponse() { return new Error($this->getMessage()); } }
